project.name: ai_lead_generator
project.description: An autonomous, AI-powered system designed to identify businesses with a weak online presence, research them, score their opportunity value, and generate hyper-personalized cold outreach emails.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: Main entry point for the FastAPI backend application.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Configuration management using pydantic-settings.

nodes.name: analyzer_agent.py
nodes.summary: AI agent for scoring lead opportunities and identifying problems.

nodes.name: discovery_agent.py
nodes.summary: Agent for discovering businesses without websites using Google Places API.

nodes.name: outreach_agent.py
nodes.summary: AI agent for generating hyper-personalized cold outreach emails.

nodes.name: scraper_agent.py
nodes.summary: Agent for enriching business data via web scraping (Firecrawl).

nodes.name: GeminiService
nodes.summary: Service for interacting with Google Gemini 2.0 Flash API for structured analysis and generation.

nodes.name: SupabaseService
nodes.summary: Asynchronous service for database operations using Supabase (PostgreSQL).

nodes.name: FirecrawlService
nodes.summary: Service for structured web scraping and data extraction.

nodes.name: PlacesService
nodes.summary: Service for searching businesses via Google Places API.

nodes.name: EmailService
nodes.summary: Service for sending outreach emails using Resend API.

nodes.name: /api/search
nodes.summary: Endpoint to orchestrate the full lead generation pipeline.

nodes.name: /api/leads
nodes.summary: CRUD endpoints for managing lead records.

nodes.name: /api/outreach
nodes.summary: Endpoints for managing and sending outreach emails.

nodes.name: Lead
nodes.summary: Data model for a qualified lead with scoring and analysis.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Main dashboard page for the lead generation tool.

nodes.name: api.ts
nodes.summary: Frontend API client for interacting with the backend services.

nodes.name: analyze_lead
nodes.summary: Analyzes business data to determine opportunity score and benefits.

nodes.name: discover_businesses
nodes.summary: Searches for businesses in multiple neighborhoods and filters for those without websites.

nodes.name: enrich_business
nodes.summary: Enriches raw business data with details scraped from various online sources.

nodes.name: generate_outreach
nodes.summary: Creates a hyper-personalized email for a lead using Gemini AI.

layers.name: API & Routing
layers.description: Handles incoming HTTP requests, session management, and directs them to the appropriate services or agents.

layers.name: Autonomous Agents
layers.description: The 'brains' of the system. Specialized AI agents that perform discovery, scraping, analysis, and content generation.

layers.name: External Services
layers.description: Wrappers and connectors for third-party APIs (Gemini, Supabase, Firecrawl, Google Places, Resend).

layers.name: Data & Models
layers.description: Defines the core data structures and configuration settings for the entire application.

layers.name: Frontend Dashboard
layers.description: The user interface for managing leads, starting searches, and viewing outreach campaigns.

tour.title: Entry Point
tour.description: Start here to see how the FastAPI application is initialized and where the routers are mounted.

tour.title: Pipeline Orchestration
tour.description: This router coordinates the entire lead generation flow, calling discovery, scraping, and analysis in sequence.

tour.title: Business Discovery
tour.description: The discovery agent uses Google Places to find local businesses that meet our 'offline' criteria.

tour.title: Data Enrichment
tour.description: Once a business is found, the scraper agent deep-dives into the web to find contact info and social profiles.

tour.title: AI Gap Analysis
tour.description: Gemini AI analyzes the gathered data to identify specific business problems and calculate an opportunity score.

tour.title: Personalized Outreach
tour.description: Finally, the outreach agent generates a custom email tailored to the business's specific needs and weaknesses.
